claims.name: Qwen steering pilot probe r at L38
claims.statement: Held-out Pearson r of the Qwen-3.5-122B Ridge tb-1 probe at L38, the layer used as the steering peak in the pilot. Reported alongside the Gemma comparison in App.~\ref{app:qwen-steering}.
claims.source: manual: transcribed from steering_layer_sweep report (qwen35_probes report, L38 row). Producer not re-runnable locally; the worktree contains 10k AL activations.
claims.derivation: Held-out Pearson r at L38 from the Qwen Ridge tb-1 probe trained on 10k AL pairs.

claims.name: Gemma steering comparison probe r
claims.statement: Held-out Pearson r of the Gemma-3-27B Ridge probe at its operating-layer-for-steering, used as the cross-model comparison anchor in App.~\ref{app:qwen-steering}.
claims.source: manual: transcribed from steering_layer_sweep_report.md headline TL;DR; consistent with paper-wide canonical Gemma probe r values.
claims.derivation: Gemma comparison probe r reported in the cross-model decoupling figure of the steering layer sweep report.

claims.name: Qwen steering peak swing
claims.statement: Best judge-resolved steering swing across six sampled Qwen-3.5-122B layers at |c|=0.05, achieved at L38. Compared to the Gemma peak swing of 0.94 (~15x gap).
claims.source: manual: transcribed from steering_layer_sweep_report.md layer-scan table.
claims.derivation: Judge-resolved swing (P_high - P_low at |c|=0.05) at L38; max across six sampled layers.

claims.name: Gemma steering peak swing comparison
claims.statement: Gemma-3-27B contrastive-steering peak swing at L23, used as the cross-model comparison anchor in App.~\ref{app:qwen-steering}.
claims.source: manual: paper-wide canonical Gemma steering result, surfaced in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Gemma peak swing reported in the cross-model decoupling figure; matches paper-wide canonical Gemma steering result.

claims.name: Qwen steering coef sweep range factor
claims.statement: Multiplicative range of the Qwen-3.5-122B coefficient sweep at L38 (|c| from 0.1 to 2.0) used to rule out under-calibration of the steering coefficient.
claims.source: manual: derived from coefficient set {±0.1, ±0.5, ±1.0, ±2.0} reported in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Ratio of max |c| (2.0) to min |c| (0.1) in the sweep; absolute coefficients normalised by cached_mean_norm[L38].

claims.name: Qwen steering coef sweep swing min
claims.statement: Lower bound of judge-resolved steering swing at Qwen-3.5-122B L38 across the |c| in {0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0} sweep.
claims.source: manual: from the L38 coefficient ramp table in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Min judge-resolved swing across the L38 coefficient sweep cells.

claims.name: Qwen steering coef sweep swing max
claims.statement: Upper bound of judge-resolved steering swing at Qwen-3.5-122B L38 across the |c| in {0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0} sweep, with no monotone trend.
claims.source: manual: from the L38 coefficient ramp table in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Max judge-resolved swing across the L38 coefficient sweep cells.

claims.name: Qwen steering refusal lower bound
claims.statement: Minimum refusal rate at |c|=0.05 across the six sampled Qwen-3.5-122B layers (achieved at L12).
claims.source: manual: from the layer-scan table in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Min refusal rate across the six layer-scan cells at |c|=0.05.

claims.name: Qwen steering refusal upper bound
claims.statement: Maximum refusal rate at |c|=0.05 across the six sampled Qwen-3.5-122B layers (achieved at L24 and L38).
claims.source: manual: from the layer-scan table in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Max refusal rate across the six layer-scan cells at |c|=0.05.

claims.name: Qwen steering pilot n pairs
claims.statement: Number of disjoint pairs in the Qwen-3.5-122B contrastive-steering pilot (|c|=0.05 layer scan and L38 coefficient sweep).
claims.source: manual: pilot scope reported in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Pair count specified in the pilot setup section; n=10 pairs * 2 orderings = 20 trials per cell.

claims.name: Qwen steering pilot n layers
claims.statement: Number of layers sampled in the Qwen-3.5-122B steering pilot (L12, L24, L28, L33, L38, L43; relative depths 25-90% of the 48-block model).
claims.source: manual: layer set specified in the steering layer sweep report.
claims.derivation: Layer set count from the pilot setup.

claims.name: Qwen vs Gemma steering swing ratio
claims.statement: Approximate ratio of Gemma peak steering swing (0.94 at L23) to Qwen peak steering swing (0.06 at L38), used in the cross-model decoupling discussion.
claims.source: manual: derived from the two peak swings reported above.
claims.derivation: Round(0.94 / 0.06) = 16; reported as ~15x in the prose for readability.
